name: Rotel Spicy ;Meat Loaf
recipeIngredient: 3 slices bread, torn into small pieces
1 can RoTel Diced Tomatoes and Green Chilis (10 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first 7 ingredients in a large bowl until well mixed.
2. Spread the mixture into an ungreased 8 1/2 x 4 1/2 x 2 1/2 inch loaf pan.
3. Cover with foil and bake at 375°F for 1 hour.
4. Remove from oven, drain excess drippings if any.
5. Spoon chili sauce over the cooked meat loaf.
6. Bake uncovered for an additional 15 minutes.
